minimal_callable_path: audio_path + source_lang + target_lang -> Whisper ASR transcript -> NLLB translation -> unified JSON
exact_commands_or_callable_steps: restore or validate model-local weights according to ./weights_manifest.json before running inference
working_directory_assumptions: Run from the copied repro_bundle root in a fresh temporary directory.
GitHub-safe repro does not assume bundled weights inside repro_bundle.
Fresh-clone replay requires network access or a prepopulated model-local cache at the restore targets recorded in weights_manifest.json.
contract_checks: text, translation_text, and asr_text are present and non-empty
text is not merely the absent ASR transcript field

weight_restore_contract.missing_weights_behavior: fail as missing_weights rather than integration failure
